integrated_now.Integrated improvement: Create one canonical MVP document family
integrated_now.Why justified: Repeated source fragmentation and clear evidence that newer package summaries underrepresent real content.
integrated_now.Impact: Improves correctness, future usability, and anti-loss traceability.

integrated_now.Why justified: UI usability, shell loop, and re-entry requirements were source-supported but scattered and easy to lose.
integrated_now.Source basis: backend/docs/UI_USABILITY.md; docs/ROADMAP_MVP_ENGINE_AND_UI.md; shell-loop and shell-reentry validation reports
integrated_now.Impact: Improves player-route clarity and prevents future MVP summaries from flattening the experience into backend-only language.

integrated_now.Integrated improvement: Restore GoC A-F experience behavior as one canonical experience document
integrated_now.Why justified: Wave reports prove materially relevant behavior that was not coherently represented in one place.
integrated_now.Impact: Preserves character/social/room/object/performance depth without preserving wave jargon as the main documentation style.

integrated_now.Integrated improvement: Make authoring → compiler → publish → runtime continuity explicit
integrated_now.Why justified: This seam is repeatedly emphasized by architecture docs and proof waves and was underrepresented when only lean package notes were considered.
integrated_now.Impact: Improves canonical correctness and runtime-proof legibility.

integrated_now.Integrated improvement: Make Level A vs Level B closure posture explicit
integrated_now.Why justified: The audit material already distinguishes slice-capable closure from evaluator-independent closure.
integrated_now.Impact: Prevents false completion claims and makes proof standards usable.

integrated_now.Integrated improvement: Distinguish enduring target-state ambition from current slice reality
integrated_now.Why justified: The historical MVP is broader than the current repo-proven slice, but still materially relevant.
integrated_now.Source basis: mvp/docs/00_MASTER_MVP.md; broad historical specs; current docs; validation corpus
integrated_now.Impact: Preserves broad design truth without pretending it is all equally implemented today.

deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Deferred task: Finish backend transitional retirement by removing POST-local bootstrap residue
deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Why justified: Explicit open residue in governance and validation; not honest to fold into a 'closed' canonical MVP.
deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Source basis: backend retirement ledger; post-locality resolution report

deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Why justified: The audit gate family marks Level B as blocked.
deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Impact: Needed before claiming evaluator-independent runtime-proof closure.

deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Deferred task: Strengthen direct reproducible frontend/backend replay in the present audit environment
deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Why justified: Packaged proof exists, but this current audit container still lacked Flask for direct replay.
deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Source basis: local reruns; backend and engine quick-suite closure reports
deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Impact: Improves present-day audit reproducibility rather than architecture semantics.

deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Deferred task: Further prove Writers’ Room / RAG overlap remains bounded under new work
deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Why justified: Governed seam exists, but remains explicitly overlap-bearing and re-audit sensitive.

deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Deferred task: Convert more of the broad historical target layers from scaffold/spec status into repo-proven implementation
deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Why justified: Memory/emotion/consciousness/writers-room target layers remain broader than the current proven slice.
deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Source basis: historical MVP layer; reference scaffold; V24_PACKAGE_VALIDATION.md
deferred_to_runtime_proof_tasks.Impact: Required before calling the whole platform runtime-proof-ready rather than the current slice.

rejected.Rejected item: Speculative broadening to open-world improvisation or multi-module freeform play
rejected.Why rejected: Explicitly outside the current GoC vertical slice contract.

rejected.Rejected item: Treating MCP or retrieval surfaces as a second story-truth authority
rejected.Why rejected: Contradicted by runtime authority docs and overlap ledgers.
